## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new MCP tool
- [ ] Refactor / internal change (no behavioral change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is covered by manual testing against a real Search Console property (or explained why not).
- [ ] No secrets, OAuth tokens, or client IDs are present in the diff.
- [ ] `README.md` (and `README.it.md` if user-visible) updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Version bumped in `pyproject.toml` and `server.json` if this PR ships a release.

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay special attention to, caveats, follow-ups. -->
